transcript.text:
[I'm here!]
[To eat everything!]
Just 4 servings of mandu (dumplings) please
[Eating all of that?]
[Tofu Kimchi]
[Korean style egg roll]
[Handmade Mandu]
[Kalguksu Noodles]
[How will you finish that?]
[Impressive]
You must eat a lot because you're pretty
That deserves an applause
Thank you for enjoying the meal
[Now it's time to go to school]
[Jungwon University]
[School cafeteria food]

[Stir fried spicy pork]
[Jjajangmyun (black bean noodles)]
[Eat all you want!]
[I will eat]
[Everything]
To be able to eat all this for only 3,500 Won?
[School cafeteria is the best!]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Goesan-gun today
I was invited by Jungwon University School known for delicious foods
I'm here to try it
I saw a restaurant here that caught my eye
So I decided to have a meal first
It's here
[Jangyeon Restaurant]
Hello

Menu
These 4 plus mandu (dumplings)
1 of each, please
And just 4 servings of Mandu
You want it all for dine-in?
Any to-go?
I will eat it all here
I thought it was for sure going to be a take out order
It feels like I'm at my grandmother's house in the countryside
[No cutting board needed]
[Tofu Kimchi]
Let's dig in I'm starving
On top
Kimchi is delicious
That delicious smell
[Korean style egg roll]

Thank you
The visuals are amazing
Looks scrumptious
I was going to wait for everything, but I can't resist
It's so tasty
Very sweet because of the onions
[Nom nom]
[Just wait a little]
[I'll steam up your mandu]
[No brakes, all gas]
I want to eat!
It takes a while because they only have 1 burner
[All ready to steam now]
Should I just eat 1? Okay just 1
It's best when it's warm
You want noodles too? Yes

That's good
It melts in my mouth It's so moist
Should I just eat?
Yeah whatever I'm going to eat
It's a regular tofu But the kimchi is amazing
It's a very soft egg roll
So moist that it melts right away
This only costs 5,000 Won? (~$4.30 USD)
So cheap
For it being this big and thick?
[She then continued to]
[Eat]
[Eat]
[And eat]
[Eat again]
[Did you forget about me?]

[Steaming hot]
[Come on here mandu]
[How many is this?!]
[A total of 40 mandus]
I'll try the mungbean pancake next time since it will take a while to come out
Are these all handmade?
This is used for the wrap
It's stored in the refrigerator ferment
[Let's make the noodles]
You can eat up to 2 servings, right?
More like 20~30 servings EH?!
Don't lie to me
[Tzunocchio]
[Sauce up the squash]
[Put it on top of the noodles]
[Special Kalguksu noodles complete]

Thank you
Looks delicious
I've never had kalguksu that looks like this
Looks really interesting
Bon appetit
It's that flavor
When grandma put squash over thin noodles
With broth
Let's try mandu now
Handmade
Definitely a homemade taste
It seems like Kimchi Mandu
It's good
[I'll show you something cool]
[It disappeared!]
It doesn't look like it's filled

But it's a good amount if you bite into it
You can taste the meat and kimchi as well
[I made it]
I wonder what's in this
It's not vegetables and it's not meat
Something crunchy
It's a secret
Secret?
I'm curious now
[exciting music]
Can't see it yet
I got it
What is it?
It's like squid
I got it!
It's pork skin!

It's pork skin, right?
I must be right
Skin I cut it up and put it in
She must know it because she goes around eating food
That's so cool
Pork skin adds a very chewiness to it
It's pretty obvious now that I know it
I'm thankful that you're eating it well
It's because it's delicious
Really chewy
You really do eat a lot
I digest quickly
Maybe because you're pretty
Thank you
Homemade mandu
It has a kick to it

It doesn't come in like 1 or 2 bites
It lingers
Just a little
[She's good]
[2 plates down]
It disappears quickly
It's not too much on the flavor either
Kimchi tastes homemade too
[Stop, you're making me blush]
You won't get sick of the same taste
I will make more for you to take home
I wanted to try the mung bean pancakes
Mung bean pancake?
I will come by next time to try it
Will you come here again?
For the mung bean pancake

I was going to tell her to to-go the leftovers
There won't be any leftovers
Thought you will just take a photo and to-go the food
[Spicy]
[Let me sit next to you]
You're eating well even with the spiciness
It's spicy but addicting
2 more left
[How are you eating everything?]
[Just laugh]
If you have a companion, they won't get to eat as much
I eat everything
How many bowls of rice do you eat?
I'm not good at eating rice
About 12 bowls?
Last one

That deserves an applause
You broke the record today
How old is this restaurant?
Around 40 years
So I ate the most in 40 years
Really
Food was great
Thank you for enjoying the meal I love you
Me too
I will come back again
[Cleaning up]
[Thank you for the meal!.. ♡]
[Let's head out to eat school cafeteria food!]
[It's Jungwon University]
Ta-da
I'm here at the university

On my way to the cafeteria
It's been a long time since the last time I came to a university
I hated going to school
But now that I'm here, I miss it
I'm thankful that they invited me here for a meal
I'll head inside to enjoy the meal
Today's menu!
There's A menu and B menu
I like both Do I get both?
3,500 Won Really?! (~$3 USD)
Not 5,000 Won?
It used to be 5,000 Won back in my days That's so cheap
They said they will provide me with a meal ticket
But I want to feel like a student again So I'm going to purchase 1 for myself
It's out
Ta-da Meal ticket

Let's go eat
Since I just had mandu The food is going be to great
Hello~!
[Turns in the ticket]
[Let's get menu A]
[Stir-fried spicy pork] [Squid rings]
[Spicy pork over rice]
[Self-serve salad bar]
We let the students eat as much as they want
It's not right to give them small portions
[You just wait]
[B course this time]
[Jjajang]
[Tangsuyuk (fried pork)]
[Lots of sauce]
[Tzuyang is here]

[Eat a lot]
[With pickled radish]
[Back to her seat]
It looks pretty empty because I didn't get any salad
No vegetables here
Bon appetit
It's been a while since I used these trays
Looks really good
Spicy pork with rice
I don't have enough pork compared to the rice
They said to come back for more
I just know it's not enough
Let's bring it right now
Do you think I can get a little more pork?
I know I'm going to need more
Enjoy your meal~ Thank you

You're welcome to come back again
Let's mix up Jjajangmyun first
[Color... sound... perfection]
Amazing
It's not the spicy pork that I'm used to
A lot of people might say tomato sauce won't go well with this
I used to be hooked on stir-fried tomatoes and eggs
It's delicious
Yummy
There was squid ring sauce over there But I don't need it
I love spicy pork over rice
Let's eat the noodles now
Tasty
It's really good
I can't decide which is better They're both yummy
If I were to attend this school,

I would contemplate on which menu to get for so long
And end up eating both
It's been a while since I had tangsuyuk that looks like this too
I've never received this much when I was a student
Even if I wanted
[Gift from her fans]
We're a fan
Thank you
Tastes very good
Bean sprout soup is great too
Tastes like pollock soup
This would taste better over rice
Noodles are good too,
but better with rice
So good
I can taste some spice in here too

Pickled radish
Tangsuyuk
I'm a fan
Thank you Did you hurt yourself?
I'm an athlete here
Really? Thank you so much for the drink
Where did he get plum juice from here?
I received a lot of drinks Happiness
It's good
A lot of people should be now getting ready to apply for universities
I wasn't popular in school Just a major representative
A lowkey representative
I became the rep from making Doraemon sounds
So if you want to do it, practice Doraemon
A lot of meat chunks in here
I like it

Eating this much food with just 3,500 Won
Unbelievable
[Where did all the food go?]
Thank you very much
[Thank you to all the Jungwon University students]
I received too many gifts today
Even chocolate This isn't cheap either
[Grape vacuum cleaner]
I received this many gifts I want to thank everyone
The university is always accepting applications, so please look into this
I really enjoyed today's school food
Makes me want to visit every school to try their foods
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
